---
title: "Planning for and Navigating Conflict"
author: "Interpersonal Communication"
description: "In this session we will normalize conflict as a natural part of human interaction and adopt a proactive approach to preparing for it within our teams."
categories:
    - <span style='color:#0096c7'>Embrace Vulnerability</span>
    - <span style='color:#0096c7'>Exercise Creative Courage</span>
    - <span style='color:#ff9500'>Candid Communication</span>
    - <span style='color:#55a630'>Active Listening</span>
    - <span style='color:#55a630'>Embrace Complexity</span>
    - <span style='color:#55a630'>Move at the Speed of Trust</span>
    - <span style='color:#7b2cbf'>Drive Cycles of Continuous Improvement and Evolution</span>
format:
  html:
    title-block-categories: false
---

To visit this session's materials, click [here](https://legacyworksgroup.github.io/interpersonal-comm/content/navigate-conflict.html) or see below.

```{=html}
<iframe src="https://legacyworksgroup.github.io/interpersonal-comm/content/navigate-conflict.html" height="550" width="800" style="border: 1px solid #2e3846;"></iframe>
```
